title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: David Ondrej teaches a course on Pi Agent, a tool for building real coding agents with AI. The course covers how to master Pi Agent capabilities in 30 minutes and includes practical examples of AI-assisted coding.
writeup: David Ondrej runs a 30-minute course on Pi Agent, a tool for building coding agents with AI. The video walks through the tool's core capabilities and includes practical examples of AI-assisted coding. The takeaway is a working grasp of how to set up and operate Pi Agent for real coding tasks.
